message:
fix(codegen): Use writeLocalVarName for renamed variables with dots

When var_renames contains capture field access patterns like
"__m22_cap_check.expected", use writeLocalVarName instead of
writeEscapedIdent to properly emit field access notation.

Before: @"__m22_cap_check.expected" (single escaped identifier - error)
After:  __m22_cap_check.expected    (proper field access)

This fixes undeclared identifier errors in closure capture scenarios.
